title: leontodon vulgaris
intro: Leontodon vulgaris, also known as the common hawk's beard or hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This perennial plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and carminative effects, which help soothe the stomach and reduce gas. The health benefits of Leontodon vulgaris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a diuretic, making it a useful remedy for urinary issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders.
